dataManagement.title: Data Management
dataManagement.exportDescription: Save all data as JSON file for backup
dataManagement.importDescription: Load a previously exported data file
dataManagement.confirmClear: Are you sure you want to delete all data? This action cannot be undone.
dataManagement.importError: Failed to import data. Please check the file format.

autoUpdate.title: Auto-Update Settings
autoUpdate.checkAutomaticallyDescription: Automatically check for new versions in the background
autoUpdate.downloadAutomaticallyDescription: Automatically download new versions when available

chart.tipsRealtime: Changes are applied immediately with a 300ms debounce
chart.tipsReset: Click 'Reset to Defaults' to restore default chart settings
chart.rightMarginHelper: Space reserved on the right side of the chart
chart.volumeHeightRatioHelper: Height of volume bars relative to chart (0-1)
chart.lineWidthHelper: Thickness of the current price line
chart.lineStyleHelper: Style of the current price line

tradingSimulator.title: Trading Simulator Settings
tradingSimulator.description: Manage your trading simulator data and settings.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: Clearing all data will permanently delete all wallets, orders, and trading history. This action cannot be undone.

tradingSimulator.confirmClearAll: Are you sure you want to clear all trading data? This action cannot be undone.

algorithmicAutoTrading.title: Algorithmic Auto-Trading
algorithmicAutoTrading.description: Configure automatic order execution based on detected trading setups.

status.title: Auto-Trading Status
status.description: Enable or disable automatic order placement when trading setups are detected on the chart.
status.active: Auto-trading is currently active - orders will be created automatically
status.inactive: Auto-trading is currently inactive - setups will only be detected and displayed
status.info: This feature works with the setup detection system. Make sure to enable at least one setup type in the Setup Detection tab before activating auto-trading.

welcome.title: Welcome to MarketMind
welcome.description: Your advanced financial chart analysis assistant. MarketMind provides real-time charting with algorithmic trading setup detection to help you make informed trading decisions.

analyze.title: Analyze Market Data
analyze.description: View real-time kline charts, volume indicators, and moving averages. Use the controls to customize your chart view and select different timeframes.

ready.title: Ready to Start
ready.description: Explore the chart controls and settings to customize your trading experience. Enable algorithmic setup detection to automatically identify trading opportunities!

trading.noWalletSelected: No wallet selected. Please create or select a wallet first.

wallets.title: Wallets
wallets.empty: No wallets yet. Create one to start trading.
wallets.emptyReal: No wallets yet. Create a paper trading wallet to test auto-trading.
wallets.realMode: Paper Trading Mode - Create a wallet to test auto-trading without real funds.
wallets.name: Wallet Name
wallets.noTradesYet: No trades yet. Start trading to see your equity curve.

ticket.title: Ticket
ticket.noWallet: Please create and select a wallet first.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.noWallet: Please create and select a wallet first.

orders.title: Orders
orders.noWallet: Please create and select a wallet first.

trading.closeOrderConfirm: Close {{type}} order at entry {{entry}}? Current price: {{current}}
trading.removeSLTPConfirm: Remove {{type}} from all orders in this position?

about.description: A trading assistant that combines advanced financial chart visualization with algorithmic setup detection to provide insights on cryptocurrencies, stocks, and other tradeable assets.

featuresList.autoTrading: Automated trade execution with OCO orders
featuresList.security: Secure API key storage with OS-level encryption

about.copyright: 2025 MarketMind. Built with love for traders and investors.

setupConfig.enabledSetupsDescription: Select which trading setups the watchers will monitor

tips.confidence: Higher confidence filters show only the strongest setups
tips.algorithmic: Algorithmic detection is faster and more consistent
tips.toolbar: Enable auto-trading via the robot icon in the toolbar

trendFilter.title: Trend Filter
trendFilter.enableDescription: Use EMA 200 to identify the major trend and filter setups
trendFilter.allowCounterDescription: When disabled, only trades aligned with the major trend are allowed

setupConfig.autoTradingDisabledDescription: Auto-trading was automatically disabled because setup detection was turned off.
setupConfig.noSetupsEnabledDescription: Cannot enable auto-trading without active setups. Please enable at least one setup in Settings.

setup91.title: Setup 9.1 (EMA9 Reversal)
setup91.description: Detects EMA9 trend changes with volume confirmation - entry on kline that turns EMA9

setup92.title: Setup 9.2 (EMA9 Pullback)
setup92.description: EMA9 trend follower - entry after kline closes below/above previous low/high during uptrend/downtrend

setup93.title: Setup 9.3 (EMA9 Double Pullback)
setup93.description: EMA9 trend follower - entry after 2 consecutive lower/higher closes from reference kline

setup94.title: Setup 9.4 (EMA9 Continuation)
setup94.description: EMA9 continuation - temporary 1-kline EMA9 failure followed by resumption of original trend

pattern123.title: Pattern 123 (Reversal Pattern)
pattern123.description: Classic 123 pivot pattern with breakout confirmation

bullTrap.title: Bull Trap (Fake Breakout)
bullTrap.description: Detects false breakouts above resistance followed by reversal

bearTrap.title: Bear Trap (Fake Breakdown)
bearTrap.description: Detects false breakdowns below support followed by bounce

breakoutRetest.title: Breakout Retest (Continuation)
breakoutRetest.description: Valid breakout followed by successful retest and continuation

minConfidence.label: Minimum Confidence
minConfidence.helper: Only show setups with confidence above this threshold

equityCurve.title: Equity Curve
equityCurve.description: Performance over time with drawdown overlay

config.title: Backtest Configuration
config.maxPositionHelper: Maximum percentage of capital per trade
config.useAlgorithmicLevelsHelper: Calculate levels based on setup algorithm
config.minProfitHelper: Filter out setups with R:R below this threshold
config.minConfidenceHelper: Only trade setups with confidence above this level

tradingProfiles.title: Trading Profiles
tradingProfiles.description: Create profiles with different setup configurations for multi-asset trading

fields.name: Profile Name
fields.overrideMaxPositionDescription: Use a custom position size instead of wallet default
fields.overrideMaxConcurrentDescription: Use a custom limit instead of wallet default
fields.setAsDefaultDescription: New watchers will use this profile by default

watchers.title: Active Watchers
watchers.noProfiles: No profiles available. Create a profile first to use custom configurations.
watchers.info: The watcher will scan for setups based on the selected profile's configuration and execute trades automatically when conditions are met.

lw91.summary: Detects EMA9 trend reversals with volume confirmation
lw91.entry: Enter when EMA9 changes direction and price confirms the reversal
lw91.exit: Stop at recent swing high/low, target based on ATR multiple

lw92.summary: Single-candle pullback during established EMA9 trend
lw92.entry: Enter on breakout of pullback candle after one kline closes against trend
lw92.exit: Stop at pullback low/high, target based on trend continuation

lw93.summary: Two consecutive candles pulling back during EMA9 trend
lw93.entry: Enter on breakout after 2 klines close against the trend direction
lw93.exit: Stop at the lowest/highest point of pullback, trend target

lw94.summary: Temporary 1-kline EMA9 failure followed by trend resumption
lw94.entry: Enter when EMA9 resumes original direction after single-kline failure
lw94.exit: Stop at failure candle low/high, target based on momentum

keltner.summary: Price breakout through Keltner Channel bands
keltner.entry: Enter on close outside Keltner Channel with volume confirmation
keltner.exit: Stop at middle band, target at extended band level

bbBreakout.summary: Bollinger Band squeeze followed by expansion breakout
bbBreakout.entry: Enter when price breaks out of bands after low volatility squeeze
bbBreakout.exit: Stop at opposite band, target based on band expansion

williamsR.summary: Williams %R momentum divergence and oversold/overbought signals
williamsR.entry: Enter on Williams %R reversal from extreme levels with price confirmation
williamsR.exit: Stop at recent swing, target at opposite extreme level

tema.summary: Triple EMA momentum crossover and trend acceleration
tema.entry: Enter when TEMA crosses price with accelerating momentum
tema.exit: Stop at TEMA level, target based on momentum projection

elderRay.summary: Elder Ray Bull/Bear Power divergence with EMA trend filter
elderRay.entry: Enter when power bars diverge from price with EMA confirmation
elderRay.exit: Stop at EMA level, target based on power bar projection

ppo.summary: PPO histogram momentum shifts and zero-line crossovers
ppo.entry: Enter on PPO histogram reversal with signal line confirmation
ppo.exit: Stop at recent swing, target at PPO extreme projection

parabolicSar.summary: Parabolic SAR trend following with acceleration factor
parabolicSar.entry: Enter when SAR flips position with price confirmation
parabolicSar.exit: Trail stop using SAR levels, target at SAR projection

supertrend.summary: Supertrend indicator trend following with ATR-based bands
supertrend.entry: Enter when Supertrend changes direction with volume confirmation
supertrend.exit: Trail stop at Supertrend level, target based on ATR extension

percentB.summary: Percent B mean reversion at Bollinger Band extremes
percentB.entry: Enter when %B reaches extreme and reverses toward middle band
percentB.exit: Stop at band extreme, target at middle band

tripleConf.entry: Enter when 3+ indicators align for reversal at key level
tripleConf.exit: Stop at swing level, target based on measured move

momentumRotation.summary: Sector/asset rotation based on relative momentum strength
momentumRotation.entry: Enter strongest momentum asset when rotation signal triggers
momentumRotation.exit: Exit when relative momentum weakens or rotates away

momentumBreakout.summary: Modern momentum breakout optimized for 2025 market conditions
momentumBreakout.entry: Enter on momentum breakout with multi-timeframe confirmation
momentumBreakout.exit: Trail stop based on momentum decay, target at projection

stochDoubleTouch.summary: Double touch of Stochastic extreme levels with divergence
stochDoubleTouch.entry: Enter on second touch of overbought/oversold with divergence
stochDoubleTouch.exit: Stop at extreme level, target at opposite extreme
